title: poa tayacajaensis
intro: Poa tayacajaensis is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly found in the Andean region. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential to promote digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource for various health benefits. In herbal preparations, Poa tayacajaensis can be used as a tea or infusion, or applied topically as a paste or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
